lessons.title: Network Topologies: The Blueprint
lessons.description: Explore physical and logical layouts: Bus, Star, Ring, Mesh, and Hybrid designs.

lessons.title: Hubs and Switches: Layer 1 vs Layer 2
lessons.description: Understand why hubs are obsolete and how switches intelligently forward frames.

lessons.title: Routers and Layer 3 Switches
lessons.description: How routers connect different networks and make internetworking possible.

lessons.title: Firewalls, IDS, and IPS
lessons.description: The bouncers of the network – filtering, detecting, and preventing intrusions.

lessons.title: Wireless Access Points and Controllers
lessons.description: Wi-Fi fundamentals, SSIDs, security standards, and enterprise wireless management.
